Active Planned Care / GoalsStart DateReason
Discharge care plan23-Oct-1998History of aortic valve replacement (situation)
  • Patient will have scheduled follow-up with cardiology and primary care within 7 days post-discharge to monitor for complications related to aortic valve replacement.
  • All medications, including anticoagulation and heart failure therapies, will be reviewed and reconciled within 48 hours of discharge to prevent adverse drug events.
  • Assess renal function post-discharge due to history of chronic kidney disease and diabetes.
  • Maintain systolic blood pressure below 130 mmHg to reduce cardiovascular risk.
  • Patient and caregivers will be educated prior to discharge on signs of heart failure, infection, and when to seek urgent care.
Care plan23-Feb-1988Obstructive sleep apnea syndrome (disorder)
  • Patient will report improved sleep quality and reduced daytime sleepiness.
  • Reduce apnea-hypopnea index (AHI) to less than 5 events per hour.
  • Maintain nocturnal oxygen saturation above 90% during sleep.
  • Patient will use CPAP device for at least 4 hours per night on 70% of nights.
Musculoskeletal care08-Jun-1984Osteoarthritis of knee
  • Reduce the severity of knee pain associated with osteoarthritis to improve mobility and quality of life.
  • Increase ability to perform activities of daily living without significant limitation from knee osteoarthritis.
  • Increase knee flexion range of motion to support ambulation and reduce stiffness.
Hyperlipidemia clinical management plan15-Aug-1978Hyperlipidemia
  • Achieve and maintain LDL cholesterol below 70 mg/dL to reduce cardiovascular risk.
  • Maintain total cholesterol below 150 mg/dL.
  • Maintain triglycerides below 150 mg/dL.
  • Maintain HDL cholesterol above 40 mg/dL.
Lifestyle education regarding hypertension07-Apr-1959Essential hypertension (disorder)
  • Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg to reduce cardiovascular and renal risk.
  • Adopt dietary changes (DASH diet, sodium restriction), regular physical activity, weight management, and reduced alcohol intake to support blood pressure control.
Immunization RecommendationDue DateReason
Vaccine product containing only Influenza virus antigen (medicinal product)01-Oct-2025Annual seasonal influenza vaccination
